mapper.select: SELECT class_id FROM student_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT student_no FROM student_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: INSERT INTO student_profile (user_id, student_no, class_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{studentNo}, #{classId}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE student_no = VALUES(student_no), class_id = VALUES(class_id)
